description: Synthetic ZIP-like file table for the package-validator scanner. Every entry name is allowlisted, the canonical extension/package.json entry is present, and the byte layout is deterministic (lexicographic entry order, no timestamps, no randomness). The validator builds the archive twice and asserts the SHA-256 is stable. No real VSIX is built or read.

entries.name: extension/CHANGELOG.md
entries.content:
# Synthetic Changelog

No real release; this is a deterministic archive fixture.

entries.name: extension/README.md
entries.content:
# Synthetic README

This fixture exercises the package-validator's allowlist/denylist logic.

entries.name: extension/out/extension.js
entries.content:
/* synthetic bundle; not a real extension */
module.exports = { activate() {} };
